svg.text: Four data streams no plant system reads together → one reasoning core → an alert that proves itself
today these live in four systems that do not talk
deterministic — same input, same output, every run
asks one question no single alarm can: are these true at the same time?
SINGLE-SENSOR BASELINE — runs in parallel, on the same data
one tag, one limit, no context. This is the comparator, built into the product.
4 rules · live values · permit CSE-2093 · 5 crew
cites Factories Act S.36(2) · OISD-105 · DGMS
live risk on the plant layout
restore a barrier → risk honestly falls. Judges drive it live.
same plant, same data, two systems watching
earlier than the plant's own alarm
Every number is computed against labelled ground truth and re-asserted by the verification suite on every run.
KAVACH · Team SlideHustlers · all plant data synthetic
